adHighCpu.description: Triggers high cpu load in the ad service

adManualGc.description: Triggers full manual garbage collections in the ad service

emailMemoryLeak.description: Memory leak in the email service.

failedReadinessProbe.description: readiness probe failure for cart service

fraudSilentFail.description: Simulate silent fraud detection failure: service logs a classifier model error internally but continues consuming messages, resulting in 0% fraud detection rate with no visible crash

imageSlowLoad.description: slow loading images in the frontend

kafkaQueueProblems.description: Overloads Kafka queue while simultaneously introducing a consumer side delay leading to a lag spike

llmInaccurateResponse.description: LLM returns an inaccurate product summary for product ID L9ECAV7KIM

llmRateLimitError.description: LLM intermittently returns a rate limit error

loadGeneratorFloodHomepage.description: Flood the frontend with a large amount of requests.

paymentFailure.description: Fail payment service charge requests n%

productCatalogFailure.description: Fail product catalog service on a specific product

productCatalogNPlusOne.description: Simulate N+1 query anti-pattern: ListProducts makes one individual GetProduct call per product instead of a single batch query, creating N child spans per request

traceContextDrop.description: Drop W3C trace context propagation on the payment charge call, causing the payment service span to appear as a disconnected root trace in the observability backend

valkeyConnectionExhaustion.description: Simulate Valkey connection pool exhaustion by limiting pool to 1 connection with artificial delay, causing cart operations to queue and timeout
